title: v6.6 frontier: Integrate Archmap into AOF governed development flow
description: Make AOF update or explicitly evaluate an Archmap architecture map as governed work progresses. Define the architecture impact contract, initial AOF runtime Archmap source, Mission Control projection boundary, and verification expectations using Archmap v0.1.0 and archmap-icons v0.1.1 as external references.
triage_notes: Completed v6.6 release closure: Archmap integration contract, current map source, map-impact record, Council approval evidence, Node 24 CI lane, release definition/checklist/notes, and release-state alignment.
